channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Cunningham's 4th triple-double of the season lifts the Pistons to a 124-104 rout of Washington
item.description: Cade Cunningham had 21 points, 10 assists and 10 rebounds to lead the Detroit Pistons over the Washington Wizards 124-104.
item.dc:creator: Noah Trister, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Triathlete with terminal cancer completes Ironman championship
item.description: An Ironman is a test of endurance featuring a 2.4-mile swim, a 26.2-mile marathon run, and a 112-mile bike ride.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: The Dallas Wings win the WNBA draft lottery, earning the No. 1 pick next year
item.description: The future of the Dallas Wings got a lot brighter as the franchise won the WNBA draft lottery on Sunday and with it the chance to draft UConn star Paige Bueckers with the No. 1 pick. “We know what No.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Report: Kris Byrant's Lamborghini Huracan stolen from Colorado home
item.description: Kris Bryant's Lamborghini Huracan was stolen by a multi-state vehicle theft ring, but was recovered by police in Las Vegas after they traced the stolen vehicle to a home in the city.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Julius Randle's winning 3-pointer against Suns caps season-high 35-point performance
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — As soon as it left his hands, Julius Randle knew his winning 3-pointer was going in. Randle got the ball with the Minnesota Timberwolves and Phoenix Suns tied at 117 and 2.1 seconds to play.
item.dc:creator: TYLER MASON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Andrei Vasilevskiy makes 29 saves for 36th NHL shutout, Lightning beat Devils 4-0
item.description: Andrei Vasilevskiy made 29 saves for his 36th career shutout to help the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the New Jersey Devils 4-0 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN KREISER Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: CMU Football looks to keep their playoff hopes alive
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—After a six-game winning streak, the Colorado Mesa University Mavericks rolled into Rapid City with momentum, only to have their playoff hopes stalled by South Dakota Mines in a gritty 17-14 defeat.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Netflix experiences streaming delays leading up to Tyson-Paul fight
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Netflix's first attempt at handling a live sports event did not receive a passing grade. The fight Friday night between Mike Tyson and Jake Paul experienced streaming problems according to many viewers on social media.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Olympic champion Lindsey Vonn is ending her retirement at age 40 to make a skiing comeback
item.description: Lindsey Vonn is coming out of retirement to rejoin the U.S. Ski Team, she announced Thursday, intending to race again at age 40 — and six years after her last Olympics.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Klay Thompson returns to cheers from some 400 Warriors employees
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Klay Thompson exited the team bus then beamed as he strolled back into Chase Center on Tuesday night, greeted by some 400 cheering Warriors employees who lined up along his path to the Dallas locker room to show their love and appreciation for the former Golden State star.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Dodger Stadium improvements could provide leg-up in team's pursuit of World Series repeat
item.description: Work has begun at Dodger Stadium, including renovations to the home team clubhouse, which houses team lockers, showers and communal areas.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, NewsNation

item.title: Warriors to honor Thompson's return by giving away 'Captain Klay' hats
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Which of Klay Thompson's returns will be more emotional for Dub Nation? His return 941 days after back-to-back season-ending injuries or this Tuesday's game when the former Warriors star returns home for the first time since signing with the Dallas Mavericks? Either way, Gold
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Lightning hosts 7th annual Coops Catch for Kids
item.description: Tampa Bay Lightning Head Coach Jon Cooper hosted the 7th annual Coop’s Catch for Kids, presented by Heritage Insurance, on Monday.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC
